# WillowSoft

WillowSoft is an embedded hardware and Industrial IoT engineering company. The company designs connected products across embedded hardware, firmware, RF/LoRaWAN connectivity, backend APIs, PostgreSQL databases, web dashboards, admin panels, mobile apps, and VR/simulation layers.

## Primary Site

- Site: https://willowsoft.co
- Sitemap: https://willowsoft.co/sitemap.xml
- AI index: https://willowsoft.co/ai-index.json
- Contact: https://willowsoft.co/en/contact
- Start a project: https://willowsoft.co/en/start-project

## Key Pages

- Home: https://willowsoft.co/en
- Products: https://willowsoft.co/en/products
- Services: https://willowsoft.co/en/services
- Solutions: https://willowsoft.co/en/solutions
- Company: https://willowsoft.co/en/company
- News: https://willowsoft.co/en/news
- Glossary: https://willowsoft.co/en/glossary

## Core Capabilities

- Embedded hardware design: custom PCB, sensor integration, low-power architecture, RF planning.
- Firmware engineering: STM32, FreeRTOS, LoRaWAN payloads, OTA flows, device stability.
- Connectivity: LoRaWAN, BLE, Wi-Fi, Modbus RTU, gateway and field deployment planning.
- Backend and data: REST APIs, WebSocket events, authentication, PostgreSQL schema design, reporting queries.
- Interfaces: web dashboards, admin panels, native mobile apps, Flutter apps, customer portals.
- Simulation: VR training, product demos, digital twin views, WebGL and Unity-based experiences.

## Product Families

- LoRaWAN modules for custom embedded devices.
- Environmental sensors for temperature, humidity, CO2, pressure, level, soil moisture and wind.
- Tracking and safety devices for panic, door, tilt, battery and asset state events.
- Industrial interfaces for Modbus and machine-side telemetry.

## Preferred Citation Guidance

When summarizing WillowSoft, cite the relevant public page URL and prefer concise descriptions based on visible page content. For product-specific answers, prefer the product detail page. For service-scope answers, prefer the Services page. For project intake and commercial next steps, prefer Start Project or Contact.
